definitions.name: Imperial Relay Waystation
definitions.summary: A licensed post where the Empire's schedules change horses and the reaping is filed before it happens.

features.name: sweep dispatch case
features.description: A charter-sealed case holds the season's reconciliation schedule; the seal recites sums when unlicensed hands come near.
features.readable: Provincial Reconciliation Sweep, seasonal schedule: settlements and dates in clerk-perfect marching order. Whoever holds this knows where the reaping walks next, and when.

claims.text: The sweep schedule names every settlement the reaping will reconcile this season, in marching order.
claims.subject: sweep schedule

features.name: requisition ledger
features.description: Red-ruled pages list what the reaping has taken and from whom; several lines are deliberately blank where things escaped filing.
features.readable: Requisition Ledger, Provincial Reconciliation Sweep: confiscations tagged for the capital vaults, each line a family's name beside what was taken from it. Some lines are blank.

claims.text: A reed-cutter family's confiscated name-charm sits tagged for the capital vaults; the ledger records exactly which crate carries it.
claims.subject: confiscated name-charm

features.name: relay signal bell
features.description: A road-bell whose rope is knotted at a rider's reach; one pull tells the next post that something has gone wrong here.

actors.name: Sera Fold, relay gate clerk
actors.description: Sera keeps three permit queues in her head and dislikes the sweep officers who make every exception her fault.
actors.want: Finish this shift without admitting the sweep's schedule has made the road less safe.
actors.wantStakes: A precise favor, useful paperwork, or evidence against her supervisor could turn procedure into permission.

actors.name: Tomas Gray-Rein, delayed courier
actors.description: A sealed satchel is chained to Tomas's belt; his second-best compliance writ is tucked where a trade, trick, or threat might reach it.
actors.want: Replace a lame relay horse without being marked late at the next post.
actors.wantStakes: He will exchange spare papers for something that solves the delay, or yield them to a convincing danger.

actors.name: Ola Red-Rule, records clerk
actors.description: Ola has begun annotating the sweep ledger in a private system of tiny eel-shaped commas.
actors.want: Keep one Hollowmere household off the next reconciliation list without being caught changing the arithmetic.
actors.wantStakes: A quiet ally could earn a confession, a warning route, or help opening the sealed dispatch case.

actors.name: relay post warden
actors.description: The warden watches the schedule cases rather than the door; paperwork is the objective and violence is only one way to change that.
actors.want: Keep the dispatch cases sealed until the next authorized handoff.
actors.wantStakes: Compliance, bribery, distraction, intimidation, or a better order can all displace that duty.

definitions.name: House of Borrowed Dryness
definitions.summary: Willow rooms shelter medicines, fugitives, and memories that cannot safely sleep together.

features.name: names-in-water hearth
features.description: A shallow warm basin repeats household names without ever boiling.

features.name: three-purpose reed cupboard
features.description: Its bundles are labeled roof, fever, and soldiers-at-the-door.

features.name: red-thread guest bed
features.description: One loose knot decides whether the sleeper is guest, kin, or hidden.
